title: FAQ System Architecture
description: Mermaid data-flow diagram showing how an FAQ system processes a user question through input processing, semantic matching, retrieval, and response delivery, with a feedback loop.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

learningObjectives: Describe the stages an FAQ system uses to answer a question
Explain how semantic matching and a feedback loop improve answers
educational.prerequisites: Basic understanding of embeddings and similarity search
